sglang.title: [Feature, Hardware] Enable SGLang on AMD GPUs via PyTorch for ROCm
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Enable SGLang on AMD GPUs


Modifications


Bypass FlashInfer backend untill it is available on AMD/ROCm


Add proper fix for AMD FP8 e4m3fnuz to support Fused_MoE


Dependency over vLLM>=0.5.5, I modified pyproject.toml just to confirm that it works up to 0.6.0 as well.


Misc.


TODO:

sglang.author: ispobock

Motivation
Fix issue #1372.

sglang.title: Enable MLA by default
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Enable MLA by default. Add server arg --disable-mla to switch it.

sglang.title: fix schedule bug
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
It may cause decode out of memory sometimes.

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

sglang.title: Fix schedule bug
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In minor cases, there would crash due to memory calculation errors.

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [Misc] Limit to ray[adag] 2.35 to avoid backward incompatible change
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
There is a backward incompatible change in aDAG API in ray 2.36. We will fix and update the ray version soon, but limiting ray version for now to avoid CI failures.

vllm.title: [Encoder decoder] Add cuda graph support during decoding for encoder-decoder models
vllm.author: sroy745
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this PR we are adding support for CUDA Graph capture & replay during the decoding phase for encoder-decoder models. Currently this support is missing for encoder-decoder models. To that end this PR makes the following changes


Updates the CUDA capture process in model_runner.py and CUDAGraphRunn

vllm.title: [Feature][kernel] tensor parallelism with bitsandbytes quantization
vllm.author: chenqianfzh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR provides tensor parallelism to bitsandbytes quantization.
It is verified, on llama2 and llama3 models, that the generated texts are the same as no TP.

vllm.title: [Model] Add mistral function calling format to all models loaded with "mistral" format
vllm.author: patrickvonplaten
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Function calling for mistral models
FIX #8301
As shown in https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/pull/8515/files#r1761725370 this PR enables function calling for all mistral models. The tools dict can conveniently be forwarded to mistral_common which takes care of correctly parsing the function calls.

vllm.title: [Misc] Don't dump contents of kvcache tensors on errors
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#8305 was recently added to dump model running inputs when encountering a fatal error.
If this happens during decode however it will include the kvcache tensors which are typically huge (~60GB in the case I was testing), and can therefore take minutes to write to disk.
When this happens the engine l

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix TP > 1 for new granite
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes tp>1 for the GraniteForCausalLM models
The logits processor can return None when running with tensor parallel, and the post-logits-processor scaling that's done in the granite code will fail on the shards where this is the case.

vllm.title: [Kernel] Change interface to Mamba causal_conv1d_update for continuous batching
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the conv_state passed to causal_conv1d_update must be represented a single tensor. This leads to difficulties with the management of the state for Jamba models in vLLM. This is because with continuous batching, the items in the current batch have arrived at different times, and their asso

vllm.title: [CI/Build] fix Dockerfile.cpu on podman
vllm.author: dtrifiro
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
podman does not like RUN --mount with relative paths when WORKDIR is not set.
fixes #8502
